flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Aspen University fell 77% between 2021 and 2024 (6.3k → 1.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 51% at Aspen University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.4k vs 4.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Aspen University fell 38% between 2019 and 2022 (80.0% → 49.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Aspen University rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $6.9k).
